meta.title: EasySite - Build Websites with AI
meta.description: Create beautiful websites instantly using AI. Free to start, no coding required.

home.heroSubtitle: Describe what you want, and AI creates it for you. No coding needed. Free to start.
home.featureAIDesc: Describe your site in plain language, AI handles the rest.
home.featureInstantDesc: Your site goes live with a shareable URL in seconds.
home.featureFreeDesc: Build up to 3 sites for free. Upgrade for more features.
home.featureManageDesc: Log in to manage, edit, and update your sites anytime.
home.step1Desc: Tell AI what kind of website you want — a portfolio, landing page, blog, and more.
home.step2Desc: Our AI generates a beautiful, responsive website in seconds.
home.step3Desc: Publish your site with one click and share the URL with the world.
home.announcement: We love Cloudflare! EasySite now integrates with Cloudflare Pages for blazing-fast global delivery.
home.cfDesc: Deploy your AI-generated sites to Cloudflare's global edge network. Get lightning-fast load times, free SSL, and custom domains — all with one click.

editor.title: AI Site Builder
editor.placeholder: Describe the website you want to build...
editor.loginToManage: Log in to manage your sites

dashboard.title: My Sites
dashboard.empty: You haven't created any sites yet.
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this site?

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare Pages
cloudflare.description: Connect your Cloudflare account to deploy sites to Cloudflare Pages for faster global performance and free custom domains.
cloudflare.apiTokenHint: Create a token at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens with "Cloudflare Pages: Edit" permission.
cloudflare.pagesProjectHint: Create a Pages project first in your Cloudflare dashboard.
cloudflare.testSuccess: Cloudflare verified! Your sites will now be deployed to Cloudflare Pages.
cloudflare.step1: Go to Cloudflare dashboard and create a Pages project (Workers & Pages → Create → Pages → Direct Upload).
cloudflare.step2: Create an API token at Profile → API Tokens → Create Token → Custom Token, with Account "Cloudflare Pages: Edit" and "Account Settings: Read" permissions.
